Sports Scene

Copied

The tennis events at the 2024 Paris Summer Olympics are taking place at Rolland Garros, the clay-court home of the French Open Grand Slam tournament, from July 26 to August 11. A total of seven players, including Zheng Qinwen and Zhang Zhizhen, will participate in the sport on behalf of China.

title: Top tennis players return to Roland Garros for 2024 Summer Olympics - CGTN
author: CGTN
